description: A color photograph of a group of about a dozen people standing in a row on a low stage for a posed portrait. They are dressed in formal attire, mostly dark suits, with one person in a white dress at the left end. National flags on poles flank both sides of the group, including a U.S. flag at far left. Behind them is a red curtain and a large emblem reading 'SHIELD OF THE AMERICAS' and 'DORAL 2026' above a map of the Americas.
